SERVICE AREA

All 11 Finger Lakes

We deliver to lakefront properties across the entire Finger Lakes region of New York.

💧 SenecaLargest lake
💧 CayugaLongest lake
💧 CanandaiguaChosen spot
💧 KeukaY-shaped lake
💧 SkaneatelesCrystal clear
💧 OwascoAuburn's lake
💧 HoneoyeWarm waters
💧 CanadiceRemote gem

GOT QUESTIONS?

Frequently Asked

Click any "Book Now" button to be taken to our reservation portal. Select your lake, dates, and equipment, pay your deposit, and receive confirmation with your delivery window — all in under 3 minutes.
Our crew delivers all equipment to your lakefront property, fully inflates and anchors the trampoline at your dock, performs a safety inspection, and provides a brief orientation. At the end of your rental, we return and retrieve everything.
Delivery is $25 for 0–20 miles, $50 for 20–40 miles, and $75 for 40+ miles. Add-on equipment (kayaks, paddleboards, tubes) is delivered with your trampoline at no extra delivery charge.
Full refund if cancelled 72+ hours before delivery. 50% refund within 72 hours. No refund same-day. If weather makes delivery impossible, you receive a full reschedule or refund — your call.
All 11 Finger Lakes: Seneca, Cayuga, Canandaigua, Keuka, Skaneateles, Owasco, Honeoye, Canadice, Hemlock, Otisco, and Conesus. Not sure if your property qualifies? Call or text (585) 337-8065.
Yes — USCG-approved life jackets in all sizes (toddler to adult) are included with every rental at no extra charge.
Some properties have rocky or difficult shorelines requiring additional anchoring. A $75–$125 surcharge may apply. We'll confirm before you finalize your booking.
